text: The men of the future will wear comfortable one-piece jumpsuits. Gone will be the tie, the collar, the cuffs. Men will enjoy the sort of freedom in clothing that women have had for years.
author: Pierre Cardin

didItHoldUp.analysis: While men haven't adopted one-piece jumpsuits, the general trend toward casual dress has been dramatic. Ties and formal wear have declined sharply in everyday life. The spirit of the prediction — more comfort, less formality — largely came true.
